hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/servers/exchek-mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/servers/exchek-mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/servers/exchek-mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json.installing" && (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund --prefer-offline) && rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json.installing") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
